name: score_id
description: UUID uniquely identifying this score record

name: user_id
description: UUID of the user this score belongs to

name: timestamp
description: When this score was calculated

name: forecast_window_hrs
description: Hours ahead this score covers (default: 72)

name: composite_score
description: Final weighted composite risk score 0-100

name: risk_level
description: Categorical risk level: LOW, MODERATE, ELEVATED, HIGH, CRITICAL

name: primary_threat
description: The dominant contributing threat: grid, heat, wildfire, flood, none

name: hours_to_action
description: Estimated hours until protective action is needed

name: grid_stress_score
description: Normalised grid stress component score 0-100 (weight: 35%)

name: heat_index_score
description: Normalised heat index component score 0-100 (weight: 25%)

name: wildfire_psps_score
description: Normalised wildfire/PSPS component score 0-100 (weight: 20%)

name: flood_risk_score
description: Normalised flood risk component score 0-100 (weight: 10%)

name: historical_risk_score
description: Normalised historical outage component score 0-100 (weight: 10%)

name: caiso_stress_pct
description: Raw CAISO grid stress percentage at time of scoring

name: temp_forecast_f
description: Raw temperature forecast in Fahrenheit

name: heat_index_f
description: Raw heat index in Fahrenheit

name: has_red_flag_warning
description: Whether a Red Flag Warning was active at time of scoring

name: active_psps
description: Whether a PSPS event was active at time of scoring

name: fema_flood_zone
description: FEMA flood zone designation for the user's ZIP code

name: historical_outage_count
description: Number of historical outages in the user's ZIP code (2019-2024)

name: persona_multiplier
description: Risk multiplier applied based on medical condition and backup power status

name: vertex_ai_prediction
description: Time-series forecast boost from Vertex AI AutoML

name: alert_triggered
description: Whether this score triggered an alert or advisory pipeline
